Table No 2 Shows that the mean score of the male is 3.86 with standard deviation .31 and the female mean score is 3.91 with standard deviation .24. t value is 1.15 and P value is .25. The P value is greater than value .05 which mean that there is no statistically significant difference between male and female Student’s usage of YouTube educational content for seeking it as effective learning. Therefore the null hypothesis is accepted.

Table 2 presents the descriptive statistics for male and female participants. The mean score for males is 3.86 with a standard deviation of 0.31, while the mean score for females is slightly higher at 3.91 with a standard deviation of 0.24. The t-value, calculated as 1.15, and the associated p-value of 0.25 are also provided. As the p-value exceeds the significance level of 0.05, it indicates that there is no statistically significant difference between male and female students regarding their usage of YouTube educational content as an effective learning tool. Consequently, the null hypothesis is accepted.

       Conclusion 
The researcher design a questionnaire on the basis of objectives research questions and hypothesis. The survey questionnaire was distributed among two hundred students of Kohat University Science and technology. The data analysis was conducted on the basis of questionnaire which is fill by the respondent. For statistical analysis researcher used spss software. The total number of respondents was 200, in which 58.5 % were males, while 41.5% respondent were female students. The majority 89% of the respondents are enrolled in the bachelor and the 19% of the respondent are enrolled in the Master program and 1% students are enrolled in MPhil and very less number 0.5% respondents are enrolled in PhD. From the data of the respondent the researcher found that YouTube videos should be simultaneously integral and a supplementary part of the learning process for students. Students find the use of YouTube videos enjoyable. Such YouTube educational videos increase the understanding of the students ‘in academic courses, and improve the performances of the students. Students take the YouTube videos seriously by students as an educational tool since they are taking notes from YouTube videos. Students have a strong motivation for using YouTube videos in classrooms. Besides, students do believe that YouTube videos improve their academics knowledge. YouTube videos help students in the courses and the authentic material presented on YouTube related the study. Thus, YouTube videos are vital for the educational learning process, and further studies should focus on improving them to serve more purposes.

Conclusion:
The researcher devised a questionnaire based on the research objectives, questions, and hypotheses. The survey questionnaire was distributed among 200 students from Kohat University of Science and Technology. Data analysis was conducted using SPSS software, focusing on the completed questionnaires. Among the respondents, 58.5% were male and 41.5% were female students. The majority (89%) of respondents were enrolled in bachelor's programs, while 19% were pursuing master's degrees, 1% were enrolled in MPhil programs, and a small number (0.5%) were pursuing PhD studies.

Analyzing the data, it was evident that YouTube videos play a significant role in both supporting and supplementing the learning process for students. Students find YouTube videos enjoyable and believe that these educational resources enhance their understanding of academic courses and improve their performance. Notably, students actively engage with YouTube videos as educational tools by taking notes and demonstrating a strong motivation to utilize them in the classroom.

Furthermore, students firmly believe that YouTube videos contribute to their academic knowledge and help them in their courses, mainly due to the availability of authentic and relevant material. As such, YouTube videos are crucial for the educational learning process, and future research should explore ways to enhance their effectiveness and expand their utility in serving additional purposes.

Apologies for the confusion. Here's the revised conclusion:

In this study, a questionnaire was designed and distributed among 200 students from Kohat University of Science and Technology. The data was analyzed using SPSS software, and the majority of respondents (58.5%) were male, while 41.5% were female. The research findings indicate that YouTube videos are not only an integral part of the learning process but also serve as a supplementary tool for students. Students find the use of YouTube videos enjoyable and believe that they enhance their understanding of academic courses, leading to improved academic performance. The fact that students actively take notes while watching these videos demonstrates their serious approach towards utilizing YouTube as an educational resource. Moreover, students are highly motivated to incorporate YouTube videos in the classroom, recognizing their positive impact on academic knowledge. The availability of authentic and relevant material on YouTube further supports students' academic learning. It is evident that YouTube videos play a vital role in the educational process, and future studies should focus on enhancing their efficacy and exploring additional uses for them.

Hello AI please act as experience researcher of Media & Communication ; Convert this conclusion into modren english for research paper that accept for international journal. Future Recommendation 
It is recommended that future research incorporates, exploration of the effect of YouTube on student performance will give a clear indication of the importance of video materials in the education system.

Future Recommendations:

Based on the findings of this research, it is recommended that future studies further investigate the impact of YouTube on student performance. This exploration will provide a clearer and more comprehensive understanding of the significance of video materials within the education system. By examining the relationship between YouTube usage and academic outcomes, researchers can gain insights into the effectiveness of incorporating video resources in educational settings. This could involve exploring the correlation between YouTube engagement and academic achievements, as well as investigating any potential disparities in outcomes between students who utilize YouTube as a learning tool and those who do not. Furthermore, researchers can delve into the specific strategies or approaches that yield the most favorable results when incorporating YouTube videos into instructional practices. Such investigations can contribute to the development of evidence-based guidelines and recommendations for educators and institutions seeking to leverage YouTube effectively for educational purposes.
